item.title: Version 0.5.1
item.description:
New Features

  • Drop files between tracks — Drag audio or MIDI files near track boundaries to insert a new track between existing ones, with a visual gap preview
  • Audio-to-MIDI progress sheet — Converting audio to MIDI now shows a progress sheet with status feedback
  • Browser auto-refresh — The sample browser detects when files are added to watched folders and refreshes automatically

Fixes

  • Fixed marquee selection disappearing when toggling loop (caused unwanted scroll jump)
  • Fixed sidechain activation causing audio crackle during playback
  • Fixed accumulated audio offset across stop/start cycles
  • Fixed oscilloscope signal offset when toggling sidechain
  • Sidechain impulse now activates immediately when switching modes during playback

item.title: Version 0.5.0
item.description:
Kern is now Gridshift

This release marks the rebrand from Kern to Gridshift. The app, file format, and all identifiers have been updated.

  • New app name: Gridshift
  • New project file format: .gsp (Gridshift Project)
  • New domain: gridshift.studio
  • New bundle identifier: studio.gridshift.app
